Reference to Former Section 1934 of This Title Deemed Reference to Section 2778, , , provided in part that:Pub. L. 94–329, title II, § 212(b)(1)90 Stat. 745June 30, 1976“Any reference to such section [this section] shall be deemed to be a reference to section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act [] and any reference to licenses issued under section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act shall be deemed to include a reference to licenses issued under section 414 of the Mutual Security Act of 1954.”section 2778 of this title

Savings Provision, , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–329, title II, § 212(b)(2)90 Stat. 745June 30, 1976“All determinations, authorizations, regulations, orders, contracts, agreements, and other actions issued, undertaken, or entered into under section 414 of the Mutual Security Act of 1954 [this section] shall continue in full force and effect until modified, revoked, or superseded by appropriate authority.”

Executive Order No. 11432Ex. Ord. No. 11432, , 33 F.R. 15701, which amended section 301 of Ex. Ord. No. 10973, , 26 F.R. 10469, in regard to delegation of certain functions concerning arms control to the Department of the Treasury, was omitted in view of the subsequent amendment to section 301 by Ex. Ord. No. 11959, , 42 F.R. 4315.Oct. 22, 1968Nov. 6, 1961Jan. 18, 1977
